question: How do I upgrade to the Pro plan?
context: To upgrade your plan, go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Select Pro and enter payment details. Changes take effect immediately and you'll be charged a prorated amount.
expected_answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan, select Pro, and enter your payment details.

question: Can I get a refund if I cancel mid-month?
context: Refund policy: Annual plans can be refunded within 14 days. Monthly plans are non-refundable but you retain access until the billing period ends.
expected_answer: Monthly plans aren't refundable, but you'll keep access until your billing period ends.

question: Why was I charged twice this month?
context: Double charges can occur if: 1) You upgraded plans mid-cycle (prorated charge + new plan), 2) Payment failed and was retried, 3) You have multiple workspaces. Check Settings > Billing > Invoice History for details.
expected_answer: This could be from a plan upgrade, payment retry, or multiple workspaces. Check Settings > Billing > Invoice History to see the breakdown.

question: How do I update my payment method?
context: To update payment information: Go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods. Click 'Add new card' or 'Edit' on existing card. Enter new card details and save. The new card will be used for future charges.
expected_answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods and click 'Add new card' or 'Edit' to update your payment details.

question: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
context: Nonprofit discount program: Registered 501(c)(3) organizations receive 50% off all plans. To apply: Email support@taskflow.com with your EIN number and proof of nonprofit status. Discount is applied within 5 business days.
expected_answer: Yes, nonprofits get 50% off. Email support@taskflow.com with your EIN and proof of nonprofit status to apply.

question: How do I create a recurring task?
context: To create recurring tasks: Open any task > Click the calendar icon > Select 'Repeat' > Choose frequency (daily, weekly, monthly, custom). The task will automatically recreate after completion.
expected_answer: Open the task, click the calendar icon, select 'Repeat', and choose your frequency.

question: Can I set different permissions for different projects?
context: Project-level permissions: Each project can have custom member roles. Go to Project Settings > Members to set roles (Admin, Editor, Viewer) per project. Workspace admins always have full access.
expected_answer: Yes, go to Project Settings > Members to set different roles for each project.

question: How do I see what my team worked on last week?
context: Activity views: Dashboard shows recent activity. For detailed reports, go to Reports > Team Activity and select date range. You can filter by member, project, or task type. Export available in CSV.
expected_answer: Go to Reports > Team Activity and select last week's date range.

question: Is there a way to set task dependencies?
context: Task dependencies: Open a task and click 'Add dependency'. Search for the blocking task. The dependent task will show as blocked until the parent is completed. You can set multiple dependencies per task.
expected_answer: Yes, open the task, click 'Add dependency', and search for the task that needs to be completed first.

question: How do I integrate TaskFlow with Slack?
context: Slack integration: Go to Settings > Integrations > Slack. Click 'Connect' and authorize TaskFlow in Slack. Choose channels for notifications. You can customize which events trigger notifications (task created, completed, commented).
expected_answer: Go to Settings > Integrations > Slack, click 'Connect', authorize the app, and choose your notification channels.

question: The app keeps logging me out
context: Session issues troubleshooting: 1) Clear browser cookies for our domain, 2) Disable browser extensions that block cookies, 3) Check if your organization uses SSO with session limits, 4) Try incognito mode to test.
expected_answer: Try clearing cookies, disabling extensions, or using incognito mode. If your org uses SSO, check with your admin about session limits.

question: My file upload is stuck at 99%
context: Upload issues: Large files (>100MB) may timeout. Check file size limits in Settings > Workspace > Storage. Ensure stable internet connection. Try: 1) Refresh page, 2) Use Chrome/Firefox, 3) Disable VPN temporarily.
expected_answer: Check if the file exceeds 100MB. Try refreshing, using Chrome or Firefox, or temporarily disabling your VPN.

question: I'm not receiving email notifications
context: Email notification troubleshooting: 1) Check Settings > Notifications to ensure emails are enabled, 2) Check spam/junk folder, 3) Add noreply@taskflow.com to your contacts, 4) Verify your email address is correct in Profile settings.
expected_answer: Check that notifications are enabled in Settings, look in your spam folder, and add noreply@taskflow.com to your contacts.

question: The mobile app crashes when I open it
context: Mobile app crash troubleshooting: 1) Ensure you have the latest app version, 2) Restart your device, 3) Clear app cache (Settings > Apps > TaskFlow > Clear Cache), 4) Reinstall the app. If issues persist, contact support with your device model and OS version.
expected_answer: Update to the latest version, restart your device, clear the app cache, or try reinstalling. Include your device model if you need to contact support.

question: My calendar sync isn't working
context: Calendar sync issues: 1) Disconnect and reconnect the calendar in Settings > Integrations, 2) Check calendar permissions in your Google/Outlook account, 3) Ensure two-way sync is enabled if you want changes to sync back, 4) Allow up to 15 minutes for initial sync.
expected_answer: Try disconnecting and reconnecting the calendar in Settings > Integrations. Check that permissions are granted and two-way sync is enabled if needed.

question: How do I add a new team member?
context: To add team members, go to Settings > Team > Invite Members. Enter their email address and select a role (Admin, Member, or Viewer). They'll receive an invitation email valid for 7 days.
expected_answer: Go to Settings > Team > Invite Members, enter their email and select a role.

question: Can I transfer project ownership to someone else?
context: Project ownership transfer: Only current project owners can transfer. Go to Project Settings > General > Transfer Ownership. The new owner must be a workspace member. This action cannot be undone.
expected_answer: Yes, go to Project Settings > General > Transfer Ownership. The new owner must already be a workspace member.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
context: Two-factor authentication setup: Go to Profile > Security > Enable 2FA. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.). Enter the verification code to confirm. Save your backup codes in a secure location.
expected_answer: Go to Profile > Security > Enable 2FA, scan the QR code with an authenticator app, and save your backup codes.

question: How do I delete my account?
context: Account deletion: Go to Profile > Account > Delete Account. You must first transfer or delete all projects you own. Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Your data will be removed within 30 days per our data retention policy.
expected_answer: Go to Profile > Account > Delete Account. You'll need to transfer or delete your projects first. This action is permanent.

question: Can I change my workspace URL?
context: Workspace URL changes: Go to Settings > Workspace > General. Click 'Edit' next to the workspace URL. Enter new URL (must be unique, 3-50 characters, lowercase letters and numbers only). Old URLs redirect for 30 days after change.
expected_answer: Yes, go to Settings > Workspace > General and click 'Edit' next to the URL. The old URL will redirect for 30 days.
